message.content:
@startuml
title Удаление объекта недвижимости

actor user as User1
participant "MobileApp" as MobileApp1 #98FB98
database DB_MobileApp as db_mobileapp_0 <<Database>> { }
control BACK as back_2 <<Control Object>> 
database DB_BACK as db_back_3 <<Database>> 

User1 ->> MobileApp1 : Инициация удаления\nобъекта(ов) \nнедвижимости
activate MobileApp1
note right of MobileApp1: request:\ndeleteAddress(userId,\n[addressId])\nloop [для каждого элемента addressId]\nrequest deleteAddress userId,addressId)\nresponse deleteAddress(success))\nend loop\nrequest getAllUserData(userId)\nresponse getAllUserData(userData,userld)\nupdate temporary userData data\nclient view update\nupdated screen


back_2 <- -db_back_3  : response:getAllUserData(userdata,userid)



@enduml
